prestazioni: VK56VD (5.6L V8) engine swap with HKS GT-SS turbo kit (GT3037S turbocharger, 1000cc injectors, HKS Hi-Power exhaust manifold, and HKS F-Con V Pro standalone ECU) for 550whp on 98 RON fuel with a 7,500 RPM redline and 3.5-inch titanium exhaust system by Fujitsubo Legalis R

Full custom BC Racing BR coilover suspension with 8kg/mm front and 10kg/mm rear springs, Swift springs upgrade, and 30-way adjustable damping, paired with Cusco front strut bar and rear 4-point subframe brace for chassis rigidity

Nismo 4-piston front and 2-piston rear brake calipers with 356mm front and 330mm rear rotors (slotted and dimpled), StopTech stainless steel brake lines, and Motul RBF660 brake fluid for fade-resistant stopping power
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody kit (E52-specific fenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser) with custom carbon fiber side skirts and rear wing, all painted in Nissan 'Midnight Purple III' (code: M7000)

Work Emotion CR Kiwami 20-inch forged wheels (9.5J front, 10.5J rear) with 245/35R20 front and 275/30R20 rear Yokohama Advan Sport V105 tires, paired with custom wheel spacers for aggressive flush fitment

Full custom interior with Recaro Sportster CS bucket seats (retrimmed in Alcantara and red stitching), Nismo V-spec steering wheel, and a custom roll cage by AutoTechnic Japan with integrated LED shift lights and a Defi Advance BF gauge cluster
